sections.paragraph: Gen 31:42 Deu 32:27, and לוּלֵא Gen 43:10 Jud. 14:18 2Sa 2:27 (compounded of לוּ if, and לֵא, לֵי i.q. לֹא not). A conditional negative conjunction except, unless (it be, it were), conveying also the signification that something really is, thus differing from אִם לֹא (compare the remarks on the word לוּ). Followed by a preterite, Gen 31:42, לוּלֵי אֱלֹהִים הָיָה לִי “except God had been for me.” Isa 1:9 1Sa 25:34 2Sa 2:27 followed by a part. 2Ki 3:14, לוּלֵי פְּנֵי יְהֹושָׁפָט אֲנִי נֹשֵׂא “unless I regarded Jehoshaphat,” etc.
